figure.title: Link Down Event
figure.purpose: Illustrates a failure scenario where a UALink connection between an Accelerator and a Switch goes down.

technical_summary: Shows the topology of ACC A, a Switch, and ACC B.
A specific physical link between ACC A's PHY and the Switch's PHY is marked with a dashed orange arrow.
A text annotation states 'A UALink Link does down', indicating a link failure event.

components.name: PHY
components.description: Physical layer interface experiencing the link failure.

critical_facts: A link going down interrupts the physical connection between a node and the switch.
